CoreDefinition: Works hard with great stamina; satisfaction in being busy and productive
Needs: Freedom to work at own pace
PotentialBlindSpot: Workaholism; burnout; takes on too much

CoreDefinition: Organizes with flexibility; determines how pieces/resources arrange for maximum productivity
PotentialBlindSpot: Control freak; tendency to meddle/micro-manage

CoreDefinition: Unchanging core values; defined life purpose emerges from values
Brings: Clear sense of purpose, values, ethics
PotentialBlindSpot: Stubbornness; inflexibility; seen as preachy

CoreDefinition: Keenly aware of need to treat people same; craves stable routines and clear rules
Needs: Clear rules and procedures; stable environment
PotentialBlindSpot: Inflexibility; bureaucracy; one-size-fits-all thinking

CoreDefinition: Serious care in making decisions; anticipates obstacles
Needs: Time to think; information; risk to assess
PotentialBlindSpot: Analysis paralysis; risk-averse; always says 'no'

CoreDefinition: Enjoys routine and structure; world described by order created
PotentialBlindSpot: Extreme inflexibility; freaks out when plan changes

CoreDefinition: Takes direction, follows through, makes corrections to stay on track; prioritizes then acts
PotentialBlindSpot: Tunnel vision; ignores better paths; rude to distractions

CoreDefinition: Psychological ownership of commitments; committed to honesty and loyalty
PotentialBlindSpot: Inability to say 'no'; takes on too much ownership

CoreDefinition: Adept at dealing with problems; figures out what's wrong and resolves it
Brings: Courage and creativity for problematic situations
PotentialBlindSpot: Sees problems everywhere; may create problems to solve

CoreDefinition: Searches for reasons and causes; thinks about all factors affecting a situation
Needs: Data; time to think; logical frameworks
PotentialBlindSpot: Analysis paralysis; perceived as cold/critical

CoreDefinition: Enjoys thinking about past; understands present by researching history
Needs: Access to history/data; time to research
PotentialBlindSpot: Stuck in past; resistant to non-precedent ideas

CoreDefinition: Inspired by future and what could be; energizes others with visions
Brings: Compelling future vision; hope; long-range thinking
Needs: Time to dream; audience to inspire
PotentialBlindSpot: Head in clouds; not grounded in reality; impractical

CoreDefinition: Fascinated by ideas; finds connections between disparate phenomena
Brings: Constant flow of new, creative ideas
PotentialBlindSpot: All ideas, no action; not grounded in reality

CoreDefinition: Needs to collect and archive; accumulates information, ideas, artifacts
Needs: Freedom to archive; place to store finds
PotentialBlindSpot: Digital hoarding; collects but doesn't use

CoreDefinition: Intellectual activity; introspective; appreciates intellectual discussions
PotentialBlindSpot: Ivory tower; stuck in thought; perceived as aloof

CoreDefinition: Great desire to learn and continuously improve; excited by learning process
Needs: Exposure to new information and experiences
PotentialBlindSpot: Professional student; learns but never does/masters

CoreDefinition: Creates alternative ways to proceed; quickly spots patterns and issues
PotentialBlindSpot: Always changing plan; seen as flaky; abandons good plans

CoreDefinition: Makes things happen by turning thoughts into action; wants to do now rather than talk
PotentialBlindSpot: Impatience; acts without thinking; starts but doesn't finish

CoreDefinition: Has presence; takes control and makes decisions
PotentialBlindSpot: Bossy; domineering; 'my way or the highway'

CoreDefinition: Easy to put thoughts into words; good conversationalist and presenter
Brings: Ability to articulate and present vividly
PotentialBlindSpot: Talks too much; dominates conversations; poor listener

CoreDefinition: Measures progress against others' performance; strives to win first place
Brings: Drive to be the best; high motivation
Needs: Clear scoreboard; peers to compete against
PotentialBlindSpot: Win at all costs; sore loser; undermines teammates

CoreDefinition: Focuses on strengths to stimulate excellence; transforms strong into superb
Needs: Freedom to focus on strengths; quality work
PotentialBlindSpot: Elitist; perfectionist; ignores problems; overly critical

CoreDefinition: Confident in ability to take risks and manage own life; inner compass
Needs: Freedom to act independently; runway to act
PotentialBlindSpot: Arrogance; can't be told anything; resistant to feedback

CoreDefinition: Wants to make big impact; independent; prioritizes by influence
PotentialBlindSpot: Ego-driven; needs center of attention; diva

CoreDefinition: Loves meeting new people and winning them over; satisfaction from breaking ice
Brings: Social energy; breaks ice; builds networks
PotentialBlindSpot: Seen as fake/shallow; struggles with deep relationships

CoreDefinition: Prefers to go with flow; 'now' person who takes things as they come
Brings: Flexibility; calmness during chaos; present focus
PotentialBlindSpot: Seen as rudderless/directionless; fails to plan

CoreDefinition: Faith in links among all things; few coincidences; every event has meaning
PotentialBlindSpot: Seen as flaky/New Age; can be fatalistic

CoreDefinition: Recognizes and cultivates potential in others; derives satisfaction from progress
Brings: Patience; desire to see others grow; good mentor
Needs: People to mentor; evidence of progress
PotentialBlindSpot: Too soft; invests in low potential; avoids tough feedback

CoreDefinition: Senses others' feelings by imagining self in their situations
Needs: Freedom to express emotions (laugh, cry, vent)
PotentialBlindSpot: Emotional sponge; seen as too soft/a-logical

CoreDefinition: Looks for consensus; doesn't enjoy conflict; seeks agreement areas
PotentialBlindSpot: Conflict avoidance; sacrifices right for peaceful

CoreDefinition: Accepts others; aware of those left out; makes effort to include
PotentialBlindSpot: Can't say no; includes poor fits; avoids focus groups

CoreDefinition: Intrigued by unique qualities of each person; figures out how different people work together
PotentialBlindSpot: Can't see forest for trees; resists group rules

CoreDefinition: Contagious enthusiasm; upbeat; gets others excited
Needs: Freedom to experience joy and drama of life
PotentialBlindSpot: Seen as fake/Pollyanna; avoids negative feedback; not serious

CoreDefinition: Enjoys close relationships; deep satisfaction in working hard with friends
Brings: Social depth and transparency; trusted inner circle
PotentialBlindSpot: Cliques; cronyism; slow to trust outsiders
